definitions: （尤指大片的）土地，地带；一大片区域

examples.text: in Costa Rica, Honduras, and Guatemala, leaving thousands of farmers and workers jobless. The companies then felled extensive tracts of rainforests in order to establish new plantations. After World War II,
examples.explanation: 这里的 tract / tracts 指“大片土地、大片区域”。extensive tracts of rainforests 表示“大片大片的雨林”。整句意思是：这些公司随后砍伐了大面积雨林，以建立新的种植园。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri
